# Nightfalls

Nightfalls is a web app for planning sunset photography. It provides sunset
quality forecasts, golden hour timing, blue hour and twilight guidance, and
nearby sunset spot recommendations.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://www.nightfalls.ca/
- App: https://www.nightfalls.ca/App
- FAQ: https://www.nightfalls.ca/FAQ
- API waitlist: https://www.nightfalls.ca/Api-doc
- Vancouver sunset guide: https://www.nightfalls.ca/locations/vancouver-bc
- Surrey sunset guide: https://www.nightfalls.ca/locations/surrey-bc
- Coquitlam sunset guide: https://www.nightfalls.ca/locations/coquitlam-bc

## What Nightfalls Helps With

- Forecast whether sunset conditions are promising for a selected location.
- Compare saved map pins for sunset quality over upcoming days.
- Find nearby recommended sunset viewpoints.
- Filter sunset spots by sunset phase, location type, and scene qualities.
- Plan arrival time for golden hour, sunset, Belt of Venus, twilight, and blue hour.

## Data Signals

Nightfalls combines astronomical timing, weather forecasts, cloud cover,
visibility, humidity, atmospheric quality, map signals, local validated
recommendations, and cached location discovery.

## Current Brand Position

Nightfalls is best described as a sunset photography planning app rather than a
generic weather app. The strongest product language is: sunset forecast, golden
hour planner, blue hour guide, and sunset spot recommender.
